subject: Clouded ACK PR 108 Sonar open-issues triage
body: ACK. I will own the PR 108 Sonar open-issues triage read-only for the quality-gate lane: refresh current Sonar issue data, identify real fix candidates vs likely safe/false-positive candidates, provide exact files/lines/rules, and propose the smallest implementation order. No implementation claim, no staging, no commit activity unless you route that separately.
